evidence_spans.span:
Maximum likelihood estimation uses the log-likelihood as its objective and selects a parameter value that maximizes it:

\[
\widehat{\theta}_{\mathrm{MLE}} = \operatorname*{arg\,max}_{\theta}\, \ell(\theta).
\]
A statistical model is a family of probability distributions indexed by an unknown parameter \(\theta\).

results.rationale: The MLE Estimator formula explicitly defines the estimator as the argmax of the log-likelihood, which is derived from the statistical model. The formula formalizes the concept of a statistical model by providing a concrete estimation procedure.
